literature.note: This ANA/DES/OPT study is not a direct literature reproduction, so validation is against internal sanity and convergence criteria rather than a paper benchmark.

below.stochastic_note: Native continuous replay became numerically unstable at this operating point, so the histogram was generated from a deterministic final-state mixture model using the same readout-chain waveform and integrated-noise scale.
